## Privacy checklist

- [ ] This change does not send transcript, audio, dictionary, hotkey, file path, or microphone-name data to third-party services.
- [ ] Logs and errors avoid personal local content unless explicitly needed for debugging.

## Contributor checklist

- [ ] I updated user-facing translations when adding or changing copy.
- [ ] I updated documentation for setup, behavior, or configuration changes.
- [ ] I kept the pull request focused and noted any follow-up work separately.
